problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
